message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_erfinv autograd via apply_function with exp(y²) backward [bd-1tax]

Previously tensor_erfinv extracted tensor_values, ran erfinv_approx
elementwise, and rebuilt a requires_grad=false leaf — silently
severing autograd on tracked inputs. Same severed-autograd pattern
recently fixed for gammaln (7cc0b45), digamma (86fb29d), polygamma +
multigammaln (bd2817b).

Wrap erfinv_approx in tensor_apply_function with the analytical
backward
    d/dx erfinv(x) = sqrt(pi)/2 * exp(erfinv(x)^2)
The derivative is best expressed in terms of the forward output
y = erfinv(x), so y is what gets save_for_backward'd — saves a
redundant erfinv evaluation on the backward pass.

Adds erfinv_propagates_gradient_via_exp_y_squared regression test
covering x = 0.0, ±0.5 with 1e-6 absolute tolerance (matches the
Winitzki+Newton precision regime of erfinv_approx feeding exp(y^2)).

ft-api lib tests: 1133 passing (+1 from 1132).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
